source: fresh local Korean ASR translate pass grouped into phrase-level captions

entries.text: Hello, I'm Kim Jeong Ah, a nurse practitioner working at Eminent Hospice Care.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Today, one of the questions you ask a lot as you start hospice.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If you do hospice, does the patient die sooner?
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: I'll give you an answer to this question.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: There are some people who ask, Does hospice mean the patient will die sooner?
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: To tell you the conclusion, it's not like that.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Hospice is the cause, so patients do not die sooner.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If you look at the research on hospice, Hospice patients are more likely to
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: live longer than when they receive hospice service.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Hospice has seen a lot of patients' condition, so it is necessary to get treatment,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: and the patient may have it, and according to the symptoms, it can be treated quickly.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: So, instead of the family taking care of patients alone, when you receive hospice service,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: the symptoms you currently have can be better managed, so the patient becomes comfortable,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: and the patient wants to live more, then you can actually live longer.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Taking good care of medications in hospice
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: also increases the amount of medications in the patient's life.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: One of the misunderstandings about hospice is that there are people who think that
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: if you do hospice, you will stop the medication.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: In conclusion, it's not like that.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: If you do hospice, you don't need to stop the medication, but you need
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: to review and simplify it,
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: and leave the medicine that helps the patient.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: After a while, instead of expecting the effect of the medicine, there are times
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: when it becomes more burdensome for the patient.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: In the most common cases, these are dementia medicines.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: Dementia medicines are not medicines that cure dementia, but medicines that prevent dementia.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 약관리를 정말 잘 못하시는 경우가 너무 많습니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 약 이름이 영으로 되어 있어서 환자나 가족은 약 이름에 익숙하지 않고 본인도 왜 그 약을 드시는지 모르고
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 자기 마음대로 드시는 경우가 많습니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 문제점들을 얘기해 보자면 중복되는 약이 많습니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 의사가 말했는데 끊어야 하는데 안 끊고 두 개를 한꺼번에 같이 계신다든가 같이 드시고 계신다든가
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 아니면 중단이 되었는데 버리기 아까워서 쌓았고 계시다가 나중에
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 깜빡하고 다시 드시는 경우도 있고 아니면 약이 그렇게 되니까 약이 너무 많아져서
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 본인도 무슨 약을 먹어야 되고 무슨 약을 먹지 말아야 되는지 혼동되는 경우입니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 그리고 약국에서는 리필을 계속 해주는데 환자분들이 약을 띄움띄움드시다 보니까
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 약이 너무 많아지는 경우도 있습니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 이 영상을 보시는 분들은 좀 젊은 세대이기 때문에 말씀드립니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 세상에는 좋은 약이 정말 많이 있습니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 약이 사람을 살리기도 하고 빨리 돌아가시기도 합니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 저는 많은 그런 경우를 너무 많이 봤습니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 약에 대해서 똑똑해지시고 내가 무슨 약을 먹는지 그 약이 어떤 효과를 있는지 그리고 그
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 약을 어떤 때 드시지 말아야 되는지
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 잘 염두해 드시고 약을 관리하시기 바랍니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.

entries.text: 이상입니다.
entries.notes: Built from fresh local Korean ASR translate pass with deterministic terminology cleanup; human Korean-English review still recommended.
